nasb.text: “But it happened that as I was on my way, approaching Damascus about noontime, a very bright light suddenly flashed from heaven all around me,

esv.text: “As I was on my way and drew near to Damascus, about noon a great light from heaven suddenly shone around me.

cnv.text: “約在正午，當我走近大馬士革的時候，忽然有大光從天上向我四面照射，

ccb.text: “当我快到大马士革的时候，大约中午时分，突然从天上有一道强光四面照着我。

csbs.text: “当我赶路快到大马士革的时候，大约中午，忽然有强烈的光从天上下来，在我周围四面照射。
